gen.generatedCode:
# Server Port Configuration
# Defines the port on which the web service will listen
server.port=8080

# Spring Boot Actuator Configuration
# Enable and expose the health endpoint to monitor service status
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health

# Security Best Practice: Run Actuator endpoints on a separate port
# This allows for internal monitoring while keeping the management interface 
# isolated from the public-facing application port via firewall rules.
management.server.port=8081

# Health Endpoint Configuration
# Show full details of the health status to provide comprehensive monitoring data.
# In a production environment with public access, this should be 'when-authorized' 
# or restricted via management.server.port isolation as configured above.
management.endpoint.health.show-details=always

# Enable liveness and readiness probes (useful for containerized environments)
management.endpoint.health.probes.enabled=true
